name: In West Jordan factory, can I sue coworker for machine accident?
description: No, comp covers; sue third parties.

mainEntity.name: In West Jordan factory, can I sue coworker for machine accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp covers; sue third parties.
acceptedAnswer.description: Rarely; workers comp exclusive unless gross negligence.[9][6] Key factors: Intentional acts only. Sue machine parties instead.
